availableProperties.name: Globales República
availableProperties.detail: Directly facing the Obelisk on Plaza de la República. Book an Obelisk/plaza-view room; street noise on front rooms. Spa/restaurant on site.

availableProperties.name: Bristol Hotel Buenos Aires
availableProperties.detail: Beside Plaza de la República. Book Superior City View on a high floor; ask for Obelisk-facing. Strong ratings, steps from the action.
availableProperties.mapsQuery: Bristol Hotel Buenos Aires Buenos Aires

availableProperties.name: Hotel NH Buenos Aires Latino
availableProperties.detail: 1.5 blocks away; strong service/quality. Upper front rooms get partial Obelisk and 9 de Julio views. Comfortable mid-upscale pick.
availableProperties.mapsQuery: Hotel NH Buenos Aires Latino Buenos Aires

availableProperties.name: Hotel NH Buenos Aires Tango
availableProperties.detail: On Cerrito near the Obelisk. Upper rooms can catch 9 de Julio/Obelisk angles. Solid NH quality; request a high front-facing room.
availableProperties.mapsQuery: Hotel NH Buenos Aires Tango Buenos Aires

availableProperties.name: Hotel NH Buenos Aires 9 de Julio
availableProperties.detail: On Cerrito along Av. 9 de Julio. Strong ratings; ask for avenue/Obelisk-facing upper floors if you want celebration views.
availableProperties.mapsQuery: Hotel NH Buenos Aires 9 de Julio Buenos Aires

availableProperties.name: ibis Buenos Aires Obelisco
availableProperties.detail: Value chain hotel on Av. Corrientes. Higher Corrientes-facing floors can sightline to the Obelisk. Reliable budget stay.
availableProperties.mapsQuery: ibis Buenos Aires Obelisco Buenos Aires

availableProperties.name: Novotel Buenos Aires
availableProperties.detail: Next to the ibis; 4★ with outdoor pool. High front rooms face Corrientes toward the Obelisk. Solid mid-range option.

availableProperties.name: Tanguero Boutique Hotel
availableProperties.detail: Tango-themed boutique on Suipacha with spa/jacuzzi options. High GMaps score; stylish rooms near the Obelisk corridor.

availableProperties.name: 725 Continental Hotel
availableProperties.detail: Upscale downtown pick with rooftop pool, spa/sauna, and gym. Excellent location score; quieter, spacious rooms.

availableProperties.name: Up Viamonte
availableProperties.detail: Central apartment hotel on Viamonte with shared lounge. Walkable to Colón Theatre and the Obelisk; strong guest scores.

availableProperties.name: Hotel Lennox Buenos Aires
availableProperties.detail: Well-reviewed boutique with spa, restaurant/bar, and strong staff praise. Spacious rooms; solid mid-range near main avenues.
availableProperties.mapsQuery: Hotel Lennox Buenos Aires Buenos Aires

availableProperties.name: Gran Hotel Ailén
availableProperties.detail: Simple central hotel near subway; strong location score and helpful staff. Good breakfast for the price.

availableProperties.name: BA Stop Hotel House
availableProperties.detail: Hostel-style lodging near Plaza de Mayo/Colón Theatre walks. Budget social stay; expect shared facilities more than luxury.
availableProperties.mapsQuery: BA Stop Hotel House Buenos Aires

availableProperties.name: Pestana Buenos Aires
availableProperties.detail: Upscale Pestana on Carlos Pellegrini with gym/spa and grand lobby. Strong reviews; premium downtown stay near 9 de Julio.

availableProperties.name: Hotel El Cabildo
availableProperties.detail: On Lavalle pedestrian street near theaters. Modern central rooms; walkable to the Obelisk without paying for a view room.

availableProperties.name: Ramada by Wyndham Buenos Aires Centro
availableProperties.detail: Ramada (Aspen Towers) on Paraguay with outdoor pool. Chain mid-range; under 1 km walk to the Obelisk area.
availableProperties.mapsQuery: Ramada by Wyndham Buenos Aires Centro Buenos Aires

availableProperties.name: Gran Hotel Libertad
availableProperties.detail: Central Microcentro stay with strong location score. Practical base near theaters/Corrientes; no Obelisk room views expected.

availableProperties.name: Rochester Classic
availableProperties.detail: Between the Obelisk and Puerto Madero on Esmeralda. Classic Rochester property; central, not a guaranteed Obelisk-view stay.

availableProperties.name: Rochester Hotel Concept
availableProperties.detail: Modern concept hotel near galleries/shops. Comfortable rooms and buffet breakfast; some rooms run small.

availableProperties.name: Hotel Marbella
availableProperties.detail: On historic Av. de Mayo with free Wi-Fi. Bright rooms; walkable to the Obelisk and Congreso corridor.

soldOutProperties.name: Broadway Hotel & Suites
soldOutProperties.detail: Art Deco hotel on Av. Corrientes near the Obelisk with rooftop pool. Front/high rooms can face the monument corridor.

soldOutProperties.name: Marriott Buenos Aires Downtown
soldOutProperties.detail: Panamericano/Marriott on Av. 9 de Julio with Obelisk sightlines from many rooms. Upscale chain; rooftop pool and large review base.
soldOutProperties.mapsQuery: Marriott Buenos Aires Downtown Buenos Aires

soldOutProperties.name: Conte Hotel
soldOutProperties.detail: On Carlos Pellegrini near 9 de Julio. Traditional midtown hotel with buffet breakfast; solid location for walks to the Obelisk.

soldOutProperties.name: Hotel Viasui Buenos Aires
soldOutProperties.detail: About 3 blocks from the Obelisk on Viamonte. Compact central rooms with free Wi-Fi; practical mid-price Microcentro base.
soldOutProperties.mapsQuery: Hotel Viasui Buenos Aires Buenos Aires

soldOutProperties.name: V&S Hostel Boutique
soldOutProperties.detail: Boutique hostel on Viamonte with A/C rooms and shared lounge. Good if you want social/budget lodging near the center.

soldOutProperties.name: Up Tribeca
soldOutProperties.detail: Apartment-style hotel on Bartolomé Mitre. A/C rooms, strong reviews; parking available for a fee. No Obelisk view expected.

soldOutProperties.name: La Fresque Hotel Boutique
soldOutProperties.detail: 1894 colonial building on Av. de Mayo, ~4 blocks from the Obelisk. Boutique character; historic corridor location.
soldOutProperties.mapsQuery: La Fresque Hotel Boutique Buenos Aires

soldOutProperties.name: Milhouse Hostel Hipo
soldOutProperties.detail: Popular downtown hostel ~5 min walk to the Obelisk. Social vibe (events/tango); dorms and privates for budget travelers.

soldOutProperties.name: Carsson Hotel Buenos Aires
soldOutProperties.detail: Straightforward downtown hotel within ~650m. Mid-range pricing; useful proximity without an Obelisk-view premium.
soldOutProperties.mapsQuery: Carsson Hotel Buenos Aires Buenos Aires

soldOutProperties.name: Exe Hotel Colón
soldOutProperties.detail: Book a City View double/suite and request Obelisk-facing. On Pellegrini overlooking Av. 9 de Julio; central but mixed guest scores.

soldOutProperties.name: Ideal Social Hostel
soldOutProperties.detail: Budget hostel ~2 blocks away. Dorms from ~$15; private rooms also listed. Best for solo travelers prioritizing location over comfort.

soldOutProperties.name: Obelisco Hoteles
soldOutProperties.detail: Very close (~3 blocks) but weak 2.0/5 rating. Choose only if proximity beats comfort and better nearby options are gone.

soldOutProperties.name: Gran Hotel Argentino
soldOutProperties.detail: On Pellegrini (9 de Julio flank), ~5 blocks out. Some front rooms face the avenue—useful for watching nearby celebrations.

soldOutProperties.name: Reconquista Garden
soldOutProperties.detail: Downtown hotel on/near Reconquista with garden-style common areas. Mid-priced Microcentro base without Obelisk sightlines.

soldOutProperties.name: Hotel Frossard
soldOutProperties.detail: Budget classic near Lavalle pedestrian street; breakfast served nearby at Los Inmortales. Bare-bones but cheap and central.

soldOutProperties.name: HR Esmeralda Luxor
soldOutProperties.detail: On Esmeralda 675 with courtyard seating. Compact downtown rooms; fine if you want Florida/Lavalle shopping streets nearby.

soldOutProperties.name: Gran Hotel De La Paix
soldOutProperties.detail: Older central hotel with solid location score and basic rooms/breakfast. Budget-friendly Microcentro option, not a view property.
soldOutProperties.mapsQuery: Gran Hotel De La Paix Buenos Aires

soldOutProperties.name: Hotel Europa
soldOutProperties.detail: On Bartolomé Mitre; simple, clean rooms with street windows. No-frills budget stay—good location, modest amenities.

soldOutProperties.name: O Rei Hotel
soldOutProperties.detail: Ultra-budget downtown option. Weak ratings (~2.9/5)—pick only if price is the priority and you accept basic conditions.

soldOutProperties.name: El Misti Coliving Obelisco
soldOutProperties.detail: A highly rated coliving and hotel option located right on Av. Corrientes. Features modern, spacious rooms with air conditioning and city views. Many rooms overlook Avenida 9 de Julio and the Obelisk. Fully booked on Booking.com for this date.
soldOutProperties.mapsQuery: El Misti Coliving Obelisco Buenos Aires

soldOutProperties.name: Buenos Aires Center Apart
soldOutProperties.detail: A comfortable hotel located just 291 meters from the Obelisk. Excellent choice for staying close to the World Cup celebrations. Min stay 3+ nights on Booking.com for these dates
soldOutProperties.mapsQuery: Buenos Aires Center Apart Buenos Aires

soldOutProperties.name: Apartur Buenos Aires
soldOutProperties.detail: A comfortable hotel located just 303 meters from the Obelisk. Excellent choice for staying close to the World Cup celebrations.

soldOutProperties.name: Ventanas al Obelisco (Airbnb)
soldOutProperties.detail: A sister apartment to the Ventana al Obelisco listing, also directly opposite the monument with an advertised window view.

soldOutProperties.name: Ventana al Obelisco (Airbnb)
soldOutProperties.detail: Located directly opposite the Obelisk with soundproof windows; features a stunning straight-on view from the bedroom window.

soldOutProperties.name: Corazón Obelisco 1 (Airbnb)
soldOutProperties.detail: Eighth-floor apartment directly facing the Obelisk; guest reviews specifically praise the view from the window.

soldOutProperties.name: Amazing, New. Obelisk View - MateHost (Airbnb)
soldOutProperties.detail: Unusually large four-bedroom property for groups, with several private balconies and Obelisk views; accommodates 16+ guests.

soldOutProperties.name: Obelisco Sky Suite (Airbnb)
soldOutProperties.detail: A luxury room located on the 25th floor with a direct panoramic Obelisk view through wall-to-wall windows. Unmatched perspective.

soldOutProperties.name: Unique Apartment Facing the Obelisk (Airbnb)
soldOutProperties.detail: Advertises a spectacular Obelisk view from the living-room window. Soundproofed and centrally located.

soldOutProperties.name: Baires Obelisk Studio (Airbnb)
soldOutProperties.detail: Studio advertising an Obelisk view through large floor-to-ceiling windows. Guest favorite.

soldOutProperties.name: Magical View of the Obelisk (11A) (Airbnb)
soldOutProperties.detail: Bright and cozy designer apartment on the 11th floor with a balcony directly facing the monument and Av. 9 de Julio.

soldOutProperties.name: Apartment with Obelisk View (Airbnb)
soldOutProperties.detail: Compact studio directly facing the Obelisk with what the listing calls an 'unbeatable view'. Marked in the top 5% of homes.

soldOutProperties.name: Deluxe Downtown Apartment (Airbnb)
soldOutProperties.detail: Deluxe apartment with a direct private-balcony view of the Obelisk. Rated a perfect 5.0.

soldOutProperties.name: Balcones al Obelisco (Airbnb)
soldOutProperties.detail: Private balcony immediately facing the Obelisk. Perfect for viewing the street celebrations.

soldOutProperties.name: The Best View of the Obelisk in BA (Airbnb)
soldOutProperties.detail: The bedroom directly overlooks the Obelisk with double-glazed hermetic windows keeping out the noise.

soldOutProperties.name: Views from the Heart of Buenos Aires (Airbnb)
soldOutProperties.detail: Large windows overlooking Avenida 9 de Julio and the Obelisk area. Rated 4.99 and marked among the top 5% of homes.

soldOutProperties.name: Obelisco 3 / Vista del Obelisco (Airbnb)
soldOutProperties.detail: Features two bedrooms and two balconies with a direct, unobstructed view of the monument.

soldOutProperties.name: Vista Icónica del Obelisco (Airbnb)
soldOutProperties.detail: A spacious two-bedroom apartment where one bedroom explicitly has a direct Obelisk view through its windows.

soldOutProperties.name: Vistas al Obelisco, Corazón de BA (Airbnb)
soldOutProperties.detail: Broad interior windows facing the Obelisk; the bedrooms also connect to a balcony. Accommodates up to 6 guests.

soldOutProperties.name: Vista al Obelisco — 6 huéspedes (Airbnb)
soldOutProperties.detail: The Obelisk is visible from the bedroom windows. No balcony, making it one of the clearest straight-on window-only views.

soldOutProperties.name: Park Silver Obelisco Hotel
soldOutProperties.detail: A comfortable hotel located just 127 meters from the Obelisk. Excellent choice for staying close to the World Cup celebrations.

soldOutProperties.name: Amazing 18th Floor Apartment (Airbnb)
soldOutProperties.detail: Two-level duplex apartment on the 17th and 18th floors; both levels have large windows overlooking the Obelisk and Teatro Colón.

soldOutProperties.name: Buenos Aires from Above (Airbnb)
soldOutProperties.detail: Wide city panorama extending from the Obelisk toward the Río de la Plata. Exceptionally well-reviewed Franco-Porteño style studio.
